hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); print(f)" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto: update $f [$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')]" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
